primaryName: OACES (RCSD Office of Adult and Career Education Services)

webVerification.sourceLabel: OACES official site (multi-source corroboration via NLD + acces.nysed.gov)
webVerification.notes: Multi-source web confirms 585-467-7683 as OACES (Office of Adult and Career Education Services) main line. RCSD's Adult Learning Center. 30 Hart St Room 216 Rochester NY 14605. Free HSE/GED, ESOL, career training. Classes 9am-noon, 12:30-3:30pm, 5-7:30pm.
